name: california-sonoma
description: Sonoma County civic data from official county government websites

config.description: Sonoma County civic data from official county government websites

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract scheduled and past Sonoma County Board of Supervisors meetings — meeting date, time, location, agenda PDF link, and minutes link when available. Each item should yield one Meeting record with externalId (date + body slug), title, body ('Sonoma County Board of Supervisors'), scheduledAt (combined date + time), location, agendaUrl, minutesUrl.
hints: Sonoma County Board of Supervisors publishes meeting agendas at this URL
Use these EXACT field names: externalId, title, body, scheduledAt, location, agendaUrl, minutesUrl
Past meetings and upcoming meetings may live on the same page or on tabbed/paginated sections — capture both when present

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract the single Board of Supervisors member on this page. externalId must be 'sonoma-district-1'. district must be '1'. Extract: name (full name), phone, email, photoUrl (absolute URL — resolve relative paths against https://sonomacounty.gov).
hints: This page contains exactly ONE supervisor — District 1.
externalId is always 'sonoma-district-1' for this page.
district is always '1' for this page.
Phone and email are listed in the contact section of the page.
photoUrl: if the image src is relative (starts with /), prepend https://sonomacounty.gov to make it absolute.

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract current and past ballot measures for Sonoma County — measure identifier (letter/number), full title, election date, sponsoring jurisdiction, measure type (bond, tax, initiative, ordinance, charter amendment, etc.), summary description, and official outcome (passed/failed) where available.
hints: Sonoma County Registrar of Voters publishes ballot measures at this URL

Extract current and past ballot measures — measure letter/number, title, election date, jurisdiction (county, city, district), measure type (bond, tax, initiative, etc.), short description, and outcome when available
Use these EXACT field names: externalId, title, electionDate, jurisdiction, measureType, description, outcome

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract campaign finance disclosure filings for Sonoma County — committee name, filer type (candidate/measure committee), election, total contributions received, total expenditures made, and top contributors with amounts.
hints: Sonoma County campaign finance disclosure portal
Extract campaign finance filings — committee name, candidate or measure supported/opposed, filing date, total contributions, total expenditures, top contributors (name, amount), and reporting period
Use these EXACT field names: committeeId, committeeName, candidateOrMeasure, filingDate, totalContributions, totalExpenditures, reportingPeriod
